Compliance.description: SARS-compliant (VAT, PAYE, UIF, SDL), CPA adherent, POPIA compliant, no violations or fines.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Capterra 4.3/5 (300+ SA reviews), Trustpilot 4.1/5; praised for ease/support.

Product Value.description: Core R129/mo (1 user), Accounting R299/mo, Accounting Plus R429/mo. Good value for SMBs.

Innovation.description: AutoEntry OCR, banking feeds, AI insights, mobile app, API, Sage network integrations.

Customer Support.description: Phone/chat/email, community forum, 24/7 resources; praised widely.

Accessibility & Security.description: 2FA, role-based access, SSL encryption, POPIA compliant data handling, no breaches.
